positive: A cozy, hyper-detailed scene of a steaming cup of coffee next to an open, leather-bound journal and a pair of reading glasses. The setting is a sun-drenched window seat on a rainy autumn day. Include scattered autumn leaves and a small potted succulent. The mood is peaceful, comforting, and highly aesthetic. Style: Still life photography, cinematic lighting, warm golden hour glow, bokeh effect, hygge aesthetic, depth of field, highly detailed, cozycore, Canon EOS R5, 8k quality.
